results.title: CHAN LONG NING, CHRISTINE V. DRAGON GUARD SECURITY LTD
results.coram: Before: Deputy District Judge Ng Man Sang Alan in Chambers (Open to Public)
results.parties: CHAN LONG NING, CHRISTINE Plaintiff and DRAGON GUARD SECURITY LIMITED Defendant
results.representations: The Plaintiff was acting in person and appear Ms Joanne Szeto, instructed by Sit, Fung, Kwong & Shum, for the Defendant
